inputs.label: Pipe Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the straight pipe section

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the straight pipe section
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de la section de tuyau droit
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud del tramo de tubería recta

inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric flow rate of the fluid

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric flow rate of the fluid

inputs.label: Pipe Roughness
inputs.businessContext: Surface roughness of the pipe material (e.g., 0.045 for commercial steel)

businessContext_i18n.en: Surface roughness of the pipe material (e.g., 0.045 for commercial steel)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boru malzemesinin yüzey pürüzlülüğü (örneğin ticari çelik için 0.045)
businessContext_i18n.de: Oberflächenrauheit des Rohrmaterials (z. B. 0,045 für handelsüblichen Stahl)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rugosité de surface du matériau du tuyau (ex. 0,045 pour acier commercial)
businessContext_i18n.es: Rugosidad superficial del material de la tubería (ej., 0.045 para acero comercial)

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid (e.g., 1000 for water at 20°C)

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the fluid (e.g., 1000 for water at 20°C)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Fluids (z. B. 1000 für Wasser bei 20 °C)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du fluide (ex. 1000 pour l'eau à 20°C)
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del fluido (ej., 1000 para agua a 20°C)

inputs.label: Dynamic Viscosity
inputs.businessContext: Dynamic viscosity of the fluid (e.g., 0.001 for water at 20°C)

businessContext_i18n.en: Dynamic viscosity of the fluid (e.g., 0.001 for water at 20°C)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dynamische Viskosität des Fluids (z. B. 0,001 für Wasser bei 20 °C)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Viscosité dynamique du fluide (ex. 0,001 pour l'eau à 20°C)
businessContext_i18n.es: Viscosidad dinámica del fluido (ej., 0.001 para agua a 20°C)
